subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! O thou who hast turned thy face towards My horizon and hast expended that which thou didst possess in search of My good-pleasure! The Wronged One maketh mention of thee with that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد یا من اقبلت الی افقی و انفقت ما عندک طلبا لرضائی یذکرک المظلوم بما
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
